title: Renovate Configuration Structure
description: Structural documentation for renovate.json configuration file

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for IDE validation and autocomplete

extends.description: Shared preset configurations to inherit (e.g., config:recommended)

enabled.description: Master switch to enable or disable Renovate for this repo

timezone.description: IANA timezone used for schedule evaluation

schedule.description: When Renovate is allowed to run (cron or natural language)

automerge.description: Auto-merge PRs that pass all required status checks

packageRules.description: Array of match+action rules for specific packages

dependencyDashboard.description: Create a GitHub issue listing all pending updates

lockFileMaintenance.description: Schedule for periodic lock file refresh PRs
